title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・沈黙を晴らす光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright shines as bright as the sun, shedding
light on the glory of the Mejiro family as she
completes the autumn Tenno Sho against Silence
Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After praising the fighting spirit of the other, the
two racers go their separate ways.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Mejiro Bright's fight is not over yet. She
swears to bring more glory to the Mejiro family at
the year-end race, the Arima Kinen.
